claim: Each `check_*` invariant shall enforce exactly one rule, with multi-rule enforcers split into separate `check_*` functions.
why: Not yet implemented: the audit-atomicity command (which flagged check_* functions with compound conditions) is Planned (internal/methodology/tools_data.go). Previously implemented as spec/tools/audit_atomicity.py, which walked invariants.py and reported multi-rule families into docs/gen/AUDIT.md, making the discipline machine-auditable; the strict zero-COMPOUND gate (test_atomicity_ratchet.py::test_no_new_compound_invariants_beyond_baseline) has no current equivalent. R-atomicity-ratchet-no-growth remains the permanent, more general growth-direction mechanism; this atom's own enforcement is honest PROSE debt until the audit tool is implemented.
